title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know


Latest Trends
Waste-based biofuels could be a key driver of the energy transition transforming today's limited supply of low-carbon transportation fuels and creating a local, circular economy, according to a new report by research and consultancy group Wood Mackenzie. Read More

The Fed is still ‘The only game in town' for markets
Frank Herbert's ‘ Dune ', one of the most epic sci-fi novels of all time (and the subject of a less-great 1984 Kyle MacLachlan movie ), featured, amongst other things, a mystical far-future sisterhood, called the Bene Gesserit. Read More

China's iron ore and coal imports were each able to climb on a m-o-m basis last month
China's iron ore and coal imports most recently were each able to climb on a month-on-month basis last month, but..

children.summary: China's seaborne crude imports in August (days representing 1-18) have breached the 8mbd mark, up marginally from the 7.9mbd average seen in the past two months but remains 10% below last year's volumes.
